item.title: Man given life sentence for rape and religiously aggravated assault of Sikh woman
item.description: A judge tells John Ashby, 32, that he will serve at least 14 years in prison for the attack.

item.title: The assisted dying bill has failed - but the debate isn't over
item.description: In June 2025 MPs backed the legislation but now it has run out of time to become law.

item.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
item.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

item.title: A grim week for Starmer – but things could be about to get worse
item.description: In less than two weeks, the PM faces a crucial set of elections in Scotland, Wales and for many English councils.

item.title: Falklands is a pressure point for the UK – and the US knows it
item.description: This story will make greater waves in the UK than in the US, which for Donald Trump is an opportunity for leverage, Joe Inwood writes.
